   374→      if (idx === -1) return prev

   376→      if (swapIdx < 0 || swapIdx >= prev.length) return prev
   377→      const next = [...prev]
   378→      next[idx] = prev[swapIdx]
   379→      next[swapIdx] = prev[idx]
   380→      return next

   399→    const latitude = Number(lat)

   401→    if (Number.isNaN(latitude) || Number.isNaN(longitude)) return undefined

   405→
   406→  // Sort state from URL params
   407→  const sort = useMemo((): SortState | undefined => {
   408→    const sortParam = searchParams.get('sort')
   409→    if (!sortParam) return undefined
   410→    const dirParam = searchParams.get('sortDir')

   412→    return { field: sortParam, direction }
   413→  }, [searchParams])
   414→
   415→  // Ranking blend weights from URL params
   416→  const blendWeights = useMemo(
   417→    () => parseBlendParam(searchParams.get('blend')),
   418→    [searchParams],
   419→  )
   420→  const hasBlend = Object.keys(blendWeights).length > 0
   421→
   422→  // Pagination state from URL params
   423→  const pageSize = useMemo(() => {
   424→    const ps = Number(searchParams.get('pageSize'))

   427→
   428→  const page = useMemo(() => {

   433→  const offset = (page - 1) * pageSize

   435→  const [searchResult] = useQuery<{

   438→    query: SearchQuery,

   442→      offset,
   443→      sort: sort ?? null,
   444→      userLocation: userLocation
   445→        ? {
   446→            latitude: userLocation.latitude,
   447→            longitude: userLocation.longitude,
   448→            state: userLocation.state,
   449→          }
   450→        : null,
   451→      rankingBlend: hasBlend
   452→        ? Object.entries(blendWeights).map(([field, weight]) => ({ field, weight }))
   453→        : null,
   454→    },
   455→    pause: fieldsResult.fetching,

   457→

   467→  const total = searchResult.data?.search.total ?? 0

   478→  function handleFilterChange(fieldName: string, value: unknown | undefined) {
   479→    setSearchParams(
   480→      (prev) => {
   481→        const next = new URLSearchParams(prev)
   482→        // Convert legacy ?q= to canonical ?name= so the value is preserved
   483→        const q = next.get('q')
   484→        if (q) {

1→import { useState, useCallback } from 'react'
     2→import { graphql } from 'gql.tada'
     3→import { useQuery } from '@/lib/graphql'
     4→import { TextInput, Group, Text, Stack } from '@mantine/core'
     5→import { Button } from '@/components/ui/button'
     6→import { MapPin, X, Loader2 } from 'lucide-react'
     7→
     8→export interface UserLocationValue {
     9→  latitude: number
    10→  longitude: number
    11→  state?: string
    12→  displayName?: string
    13→}
    14→
    15→const ResolveZipQuery = graphql(`
    16→  query ResolveZip($zip: String!) {
    17→    resolveZip(zip: $zip) {
    18→      zip
    19→      latitude
    20→      longitude
    21→      state
    22→      city
    23→    }
    24→  }
    25→`)
    26→
    27→export interface LocationInputProps {
    28→  value: UserLocationValue | undefined
    29→  onChange: (loc: UserLocationValue | undefined) => void
    30→}
    31→
    32→export function LocationInput({ value, onChange }: LocationInputProps) {
    33→  const [zipInput, setZipInput] = useState('')
    34→  const [zipError, setZipError] = useState<string | undefined>()
    35→  const [geoLoading, setGeoLoading] = useState(false)
    36→
    37→  const zipToResolve = /^\d{5}$/.test(zipInput) ? zipInput : null
    38→
    39→  const [zipResult] = useQuery<{
    40→    resolveZip: { zip: string; latitude: number; longitude: number; state: string; city: string } | null
    41→  }>({
    42→    query: ResolveZipQuery,
    43→    variables: { zip: zipToResolve ?? '' },
    44→    pause: !zipToResolve,
    45→  })
    46→
    47→  const handleZipSubmit = useCallback(() => {
    48→    if (!/^\d{5}$/.test(zipInput)) {
    49→      setZipError('Enter a 5-digit ZIP code')
    50→      return
    51→    }
    52→    setZipError(undefined)
    53→
    54→    if (zipResult.data?.resolveZip) {
    55→      const z = zipResult.data.resolveZip
    56→      onChange({
    57→        latitude: z.latitude,
    58→        longitude: z.longitude,
    59→        state: z.state,
    60→        displayName: `${z.city}, ${z.state}`,
    61→      })
    62→    } else if (zipResult.fetching) {
    63→      // Wait for result — user will need to submit again
    64→      setZipError('Looking up ZIP code…')
    65→    } else {
    66→      setZipError('ZIP code not found')
    67→    }
    68→  }, [zipInput, zipResult, onChange])
    69→
    70→  const handleGeolocation = useCallback(() => {
    71→    if (!navigator.geolocation) {
    72→      setZipError('Geolocation not supported')
    73→      return
    74→    }
    75→    setGeoLoading(true)
    76→    navigator.geolocation.getCurrentPosition(
    77→      (pos) => {
    78→        setGeoLoading(false)
    79→        onChange({
    80→          latitude: pos.coords.latitude,
    81→          longitude: pos.coords.longitude,
    82→          displayName: `${pos.coords.latitude.toFixed(2)}°, ${pos.coords.longitude.toFixed(2)}°`,
    83→        })
    84→      },
    85→      () => {
    86→        setGeoLoading(false)
    87→        setZipError('Could not get your location')
    88→      },
    89→    )
    90→  }, [onChange])
    91→
    92→  const handleClear = useCallback(() => {
    93→    onChange(undefined)
    94→    setZipInput('')
    95→    setZipError(undefined)
    96→  }, [onChange])
    97→
    98→  if (value) {
    99→    return (
   100→      <Group gap="xs">
   101→        <MapPin size={14} />
   102→        <Text size="sm" fw={500}>
   103→          {value.displayName ?? `${value.latitude.toFixed(2)}°, ${value.longitude.toFixed(2)}°`}
   104→        </Text>
   105→        <Button variant="ghost" size="compact-xs" onClick={handleClear} aria-label="Clear location">
   106→          <X size={12} />
   107→        </Button>
   108→      </Group>
   109→    )
   110→  }
   111→
   112→  return (
   113→    <Stack gap="xs">
   114→      <Group gap="xs" align="flex-end">
   115→        <TextInput
   116→          label="ZIP code"
   117→          placeholder="e.g. 02134"
   118→          value={zipInput}
   119→          onChange={(e) => {
   120→            setZipInput(e.currentTarget.value)
   121→            setZipError(undefined)
   122→          }}
   123→          onKeyDown={(e) => {
   124→            if (e.key === 'Enter') handleZipSubmit()
   125→          }}
   126→          error={zipError}
   127→          size="xs"
   128→          style={{ flex: 1 }}
   129→        />
   130→        <Button variant="default" size="xs" onClick={handleZipSubmit} disabled={zipResult.fetching}>
   131→          Go
   132→        </Button>
   133→      </Group>
   134→      <Button
   135→        variant="light"
   136→        size="xs"
   137→
   138→        leftSection={geoLoading ? <Loader2 size={14} /> : <MapPin size={14} />}
   139→        onClick={handleGeolocation}
   140→        disabled={geoLoading}
   141→      >
   142→        Use my location
   143→      </Button>
   144→    </Stack>
   145→  )
   146→}
   147→

1→import { create } from 'zustand'
     2→import { graphql } from 'gql.tada'
     3→import { urqlClient } from '@/lib/urqlClient'
     4→
     5→const PreferencesQuery = graphql(`
     6→  query Preferences {
     7→    preferences {
     8→      homeLatitude
     9→      homeLongitude
    10→      homeState
    11→    }
    12→  }
    13→`)
    14→
    15→const UpdatePreferencesMutation = graphql(`
    16→  mutation UpdatePreferences($input: UpdatePreferencesInput!) {
    17→    updatePreferences(input: $input) {
    18→      homeLatitude
    19→      homeLongitude
    20→      homeState
    21→    }
    22→  }
    23→`)
    24→
    25→interface PreferencesData {
    26→  homeLatitude: number | null
    27→  homeLongitude: number | null
    28→  homeState: string | null
    29→}
    30→
    31→interface PreferencesState extends PreferencesData {
    32→  loaded: boolean
    33→  loading: boolean
    34→
    35→  load: () => Promise<void>
    36→  update: (prefs: Partial<PreferencesData>) => Promise<void>
    37→  clear: () => void
    38→}
    39→
    40→export const usePreferencesStore = create<PreferencesState>()((set, get) => ({
    41→  homeLatitude: null,
    42→  homeLongitude: null,
    43→  homeState: null,
    44→  loaded: false,
    45→  loading: false,
    46→
    47→  load: async () => {
    48→    if (get().loaded || get().loading) return
    49→    set({ loading: true })
    50→    try {
    51→      const result = await urqlClient
    52→        .query<{ preferences: PreferencesData }>(PreferencesQuery, {})
    53→        .toPromise()
    54→      if (result.data?.preferences) {
    55→        const { homeLatitude, homeLongitude, homeState } = result.data.preferences
    56→        set({
    57→          homeLatitude: homeLatitude ?? null,
    58→          homeLongitude: homeLongitude ?? null,
    59→          homeState: homeState ?? null,
    60→          loaded: true,
    61→        })
    62→      }
    63→    } finally {
    64→      set({ loading: false })
    65→    }
    66→  },
    67→
    68→  update: async (prefs) => {
    69→    const result = await urqlClient
    70→      .mutation<{ updatePreferences: PreferencesData }>(UpdatePreferencesMutation, { input: prefs })
    71→      .toPromise()
    72→    if (result.data?.updatePreferences) {
    73→      const { homeLatitude, homeLongitude, homeState } = result.data.updatePreferences
    74→      set({
    75→        homeLatitude: homeLatitude ?? null,
    76→        homeLongitude: homeLongitude ?? null,
    77→        homeState: homeState ?? null,
    78→      })
    79→    }
    80→  },
    81→
    82→  clear: () => {
    83→    set({
    84→      homeLatitude: null,
    85→      homeLongitude: null,
    86→      homeState: null,
    87→      loaded: false,
    88→      loading: false,
    89→    })
    90→  },
    91→}))
    92→
